display_text: Cost: 140: Provides a modest early-game increase in base health and damage through +3 Strength. The cheapest source of raw Strength in the game, offering efficient cost per stat for heroes wanting to improve their HP and melee damage output early. No active or passive effects beyond the attribute bonus. Stats: +3 Strength.
